title: PvP Crosshair Pack
description: This pack has the one and ONLY crosshair you will ever need to download.
body:
Title: PvP Crosshair Pack

Description:
Take your Minecraft gameplay to the next level with the Neon X Crosshair Pack! This pack completely replaces the default crosshair with a clean, modern X design that is easy to see and stylish. Perfect for both PvP battles and survival adventures, it helps you aim precisely without cluttering your screen.

Designed for clarity and visibility, the bright neon colors make it easy to spot the center of your screen, even on dark or busy backgrounds. The minimalistic design ensures your view stays clear while adding a touch of flair to your HUD.

This pack is lightweight and easy to install, requiring only Minecraft’s built-in resource pack system—no mods or extra software needed. Ideal for players who want a small but impactful visual upgrade that enhances their gameplay immediately.

Features:

-Bright, neon X crosshair for maximum visibility

-Minimalistic design that doesn’t block your view

-Works in both PvP and survival

-Lightweight and easy to install

-Fully compatible with Minecraft 1.20+

Perfect for:

-PvP enthusiasts

-Builders who want a clean HUD

-Anyone looking for a small, stylish upgrade to Minecraft’s GUI
